overall.description: First-person perspective walk along a coastal dirt road in a video game environment (resembling GTA V), featuring an overcast beach with a distant wooden pier, rocky cliffs, and occasional vehicles passing by. The camera moves steadily forward along the roadside with the ocean and sandy beach visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside dirt road overlooking sandy beach

events.description: large white truck approaches from behind and overtakes on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt coastal road parallel to the beach

notable_agents.action: large white truck overtaking the camera position on the dirt road

entered.detail: calm blue ocean extending to the horizon under overcast sky
wide sandy beach with scattered beachgoers and colorful umbrellas
long wooden pier structure extending into the ocean with vertical supports
steep rocky cliff formation with sparse vegetation rising beside the road
unpaved dirt and gravel road running parallel to the coastline
wooden utility poles with power lines running along the road
scattered large boulders on the sandy beach near the waterline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a coastal dirt road. The ocean stretches to the left with a sandy beach and distant pier, while rocky cliffs rise on the right. A large white truck overtakes the camera on the road around the 8-second mark, temporarily dominating the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal road with beach and pier becoming more prominent

events.description: dark colored sedan approaches from behind and passes on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal road as the beach curves and the pier grows larger in view

notable_agents.action: dark sedan overtaking the camera position on the road

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward along the coastal road between the passing of the truck and the next vehicle. The wooden pier becomes more prominent in the center of the frame, and large rocks on the beach move closer to the foreground. A dark sedan passes by on the right around 22 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the wooden pier along the coastal road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the wooden pier as the road curves slightly inland

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the continued approach toward the wooden pier, which now dominates the center of the frame. The rocky cliffside recedes into the distance on the right, while power lines become more prominent in the mid-ground. No vehicles pass during this segment, and the camera maintains a steady walking pace along the coastal road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a coastal dirt road that gradually centers its focus on a distant wooden pier. It begins with the ocean and a sandy beach stretching to the left and rocky cliffs rising to the right, just as a large white truck overtakes the camera and temporarily dominates the frame. As the camera continues forward, the wooden pier becomes more prominent in the center and large rocks on the beach shift into the foreground before a dark sedan passes by on the right. The scene then opens further as the rocky cliffside recedes into the distance and power lines emerge in the mid-ground. Finally, the camera maintains a steady pace until the wooden pier dominates the center of the view.
